data class Verdict(val outcome: String, val confidence: String, val evidence: List<String>, val gaps: List<String>)

data class Result(val verdict: Verdict)

fun plan(workspace: String): Result {
    val repoReadme = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/README.md")
    val repoIndex = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/index.md")
    val maintenance = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/maintenance.md")
    val generatedIndex = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/generated/repo_index.md")
    val principles = readFile("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/modules/overview/engineering-principles.md")
    val reviewInputs = readReviewPreflightInputs("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem")
    val planArtifact = extractSubmittedPlan(reviewInputs)
    val changedFiles = listChangedFiles("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem")
    val relevantContextPaths = selectRelevantRepoContext(planArtifact, changedFiles, repoIndex, generatedIndex)
    val relevantContext = readFiles(relevantContextPaths)
    val sourceSnapshots = readFiles(changedFiles)
    val diff = readGitDiff("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem")
    val testSignals = readAvailableTestResults("/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem")
    val implementationClaims = deriveImplementationClaims(diff, sourceSnapshots, relevantContext)
    val planRequirements = derivePlanRequirements(planArtifact, repoReadme, maintenance, principles, relevantContext)
    val coverageAssessment = compareCodeToPlan(planRequirements, implementationClaims, testSignals)
    val hotPathAssessment = assessInfrastructureRisks(coverageAssessment, diff, sourceSnapshots)
    val verdict = buildCodeImplementsPlanVerdict(coverageAssessment, hotPathAssessment)
    return makeResult(verdict)
}
